title: JavaScript Date Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of creating and manipulating dates in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct syntax for creating a Date object for the current date and time?
Which month does 0 represent in a JavaScript Date literal (new Date(2022, 0))?
What does the getFullYear() method return?
options: The age of the user based on their birth date.

questions.question: Which method should you use to return a Date as an ISO 8601 string (useful for database storage)?
What is 'January 1, 1970, 00:00:00 UTC' often called in software development?
